title: lavandula mairei var. antiatlantica
intro: Lavandula mairei var. antiatlantica, also known as the dwarf English lavender, is a low-growing, compact shrub that belongs to the lavender family. It possesses medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of volatile oils and flavonoids, which have been used to treat various health issues. This plant has been associated with several health benefits, including its sedative, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate anxiety, insomnia, and skin irritations. Lavandula mairei var. antiatlantica can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are often utilized in aromatherapy and traditional medicine.
